problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces may resolve How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
